mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupons WHERE UPPER(code) = UPPER(#{code})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupons SET current_usages = current_usages + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND current_usages < max_usages
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_usages (coupon_id, user_id, used_at) VALUES (#{couponId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO coupons (code, max_usages, current_usages, country_code, created_at) VALUES (UPPER(#{code}), #{maxUsages}, 0, #{countryCode}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
